initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    w.w_warehouse_name,
    i.i_item_desc,
    SUM(ss.ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales_volume
FROM 
    store_sales ss
JOIN 
    warehouse w ON ss.ss_warehouse_sk = w.w_warehouse_sk
JOIN 
    item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
GROUP BY 
    w.w_warehouse_name,
    i.i_item_desc
LIMIT 100

    w.w_warehouse_name,
    i.i_item_desc,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales_volume
